x-spreadsheet (vendored)
========================

Source:  https://github.com/myliang/x-spreadsheet
License: MIT (see upstream LICENSE)
Version: 1.1.8 (master at time of vendoring)

These two files are served as-is by Flask's static handler from
purchasetracker/static/vendor/xspreadsheet/ and loaded by
purchasetracker/templates/templates/edit.html.

To update, replace xspreadsheet.js and xspreadsheet.css with newer
copies from the upstream repository's dist/ directory.
